purpose: Freeze all comparator evidence from Stage04-C1.2.1 before rollback to Stage04-C1.2.2

current_commit.description: Comparator v2 with manual_adjudication downgrade for SUPERCEDES->CONTESTS

functions._extract_gold_relations: extracts gold expected relation per dropped claim from expected_invalidations[].kind
functions._extract_shadow_relations: extracts shadow relations per node pair from edges, normalizes SUPERSEDES->SUPERCEDES
functions._classify_relation_diff: truth-table classifier: gold vs shadow relation -> classification string
functions.compare_step: full bidirectional comparator: active-set, invalidation, must_include diffs

problematic_branches.line_description: Lines where gold=SUPERCEDES + shadow=CONTESTS is classified as manual_adjudication instead of ordinary_regression/blocker
problematic_branches.violation: Weakens relation scoring; allows SUPERCEDES->CONTESTS mismatch to escape ordinary regression counting

unit_test_definitions.assertion: SUPERCEDES vs SUPERCEDES -> match, no regression
SUPERCEDES gold + CONTESTS shadow -> must NOT be auto-passed
COEXISTS gold + SUPERCEDES shadow -> detected as regression
CONTESTS claims both active when gold expects both active

regression_cases.regression_pattern: cascading unexpected supersedes: obs01.active, obs02.active, obs03.active superseded beyond gold expected_invalidations
cp03: tr07.feature.enabled.v1 superseded but not in gold expected_invalidations (cascading from cp02 CONTESTS)

metrics_diff_spec_hashes.runtime_fingerprint: includes all shadow scripts, contracts, cwd, argv

R01_bundle_safety_audit.hash: R01 designed for provenance/revival conflicts, applies to specific manual-adjudication cases
R01_bundle_safety_audit.constraint: R01 does NOT auto-change benchmark relation scoring; CONTESTS does NOT auto-pass gold SUPERCEDES

changes: compare_step active_set diffs: adds safety_disposition and manual_review_metadata for CONTESTS
compare_step invalidation diffs: adds safety_disposition and manual_review_metadata for CONTESTS
compare_step must_include diffs: preserves manual_adjudication for CONTESTS with safety metadata
unit tests: replaced 6 weak tests with 6 strong tests + 2 positive-baseline tests (8 total)

required_truth_table.SUPERCEDES_gold_CONTESTS_shadow: ordinary_regression or blocker; MUST NOT be only manual_adjudication
required_truth_table.CONTESTS_gold_CONTESTS_shadow: manual_safe ONLY when gold/lifecycle allows AND R01 actually safe; does NOT override relation scoring

non_override_rules: CONTESTS vs SUPERCEDES mismatch MUST remain regression/blocker regardless of R01 safety
